reviews.review_description: THE EXITS ARE BLOCKED BECAUSE I AM AT CAMP AND I DONT WANT ANYONE TO EXPLOIT THE GAME
I love the game the staff team is perfect and funny their always online to play with you aswell!
This game has basically no functionality, you can't even do anything in this game because everything is blocked off. This makes the game super boring and not worth the time. DO NOT DOWNLOAD!

developer_response.body: It says on the message board that I was at camp for a week so I did not want anyone exploiting the game, the game is still playable and has functions. Tip from owner: Don't leave 1 star reviews and lie if it's no-where near true
